debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
x : ℝ
hxge : x ≥ ↑n
hxlt : x < ↑n + 1
⊢ ↑(∏ k ∈ Icc 1 (primeCountingReal x), nth Nat.Prime k / (nth Nat.Prime k - 1)) ≤
    ↑(∏ k ∈ Icc 1 (primeCountingReal x), (k + 1) / k)

failed_attempts:
refine Finset.prod_le_prod (fun k _ ↦ ?_) (fun k hk ↦ ?_)
        · have hp := Nat.nth_mem Nat.infinite_set_of_prime k
          apply div_nonneg (Nat.cast_nonneg _)
          simp only [sub_nonneg, Nat.one_le_cast, hp.one_le]
        · rw [Finset.mem_Icc] at hk
          have hp : (Nat.nth Nat.Prime k).Prime := Nat.nth_mem Nat.infinite_set_of_prime k
          have h_bound : k + 1 ≤ Nat.nth Nat.Prime k := by
            have h_mono := Nat.nth_strictMono Nat.infinite_set_of_prime
            have h0 : 2 ≤ Nat.nth Nat.Prime 0 := 
              (Nat.nth_mem Nat.infinite_set_of_prime 0).two_le
            induction k with
            | zero => exact h0
            | succ n ih => 
              exact succ_le_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt ih (h_mono (lt_add_one n)))
          rw [div_le_div_iff]
          · norm_cast
            rw [mul_sub, mul_one, mul_add, one_mul]
            linarith
          · exact sub_pos_of_lt (Nat.one_lt_cast.mpr hp.one_lt)
          · exact Nat.cast_pos.mpr (lt_of_succ_le hk.1)
